modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help with hardware upgrades for university computer.

full_description_text:  
I want to upgrade my SSD drive.  
Also, I need a charging cable for my laptop.  
My desktop makes a clicking sound sometimes.  
I think I need more RAM and a PCIe card too.  
My battery doesn't hold charge well.
short_description: Need help with hardware upgrades for university computer.
description:

Also, I need a charging cable for my laptop.

My battery doesn't hold charge well.
